description: Composition Off white kurta made of blended cotton, has short sleeves, boat neck, half hooked placket, woven tape detailing on the chest and cuffs, ethnic print and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Vintage weaves, classic cuts and contemporary style - all come together in this kurta from diva. Crafted from a soft blended fabric, it offers exemplary comfort all day. Pair it with patialas or churidars and embellished slippers for an ethnic look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5’9”, chest 33” and shoulders 15.5”
